title: Air India SATS is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Air India SATS is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
We at Air India SATS are looking for an experienced Guest Relations Manager based out of Jaipur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Air India SATS:
Air India SATS is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Yield Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Air India SATS!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
